---
title: 'Fed By Faith Verses'
date: '2013-04-15T03:47:00.0020000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '3898440068100005282'
blogger_filename: '/2013/04/fed-by-faith-verses.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Scripture'
---

Fed By Faith Verses<br />
<br />
<br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
Romans 1:17; Galatians 3:11; Hebrews 10:38;<br />“The Just Shall Live By Faith”&nbsp;</blockquote>
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
Hebrews 11:1<br />1 Now faith is the substance of things hoped for, the evidence of things not seen.</blockquote>
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
Romans 5:1-10<br />1 Therefore, having been justified by faith, we have peace with God through our Lord Jesus Christ, 2 through whom also we have access by faith into this grace in which we stand, and rejoice in hope of the glory of God. 3 And not only that, but we also glory in tribulations, knowing that tribulation produces perseverance; 4 and perseverance, character; and character, hope. 5 Now hope does not disappoint, because the love of God has been poured out in our hearts by the Holy Spirit who was given to us.</blockquote>
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
Habakkuk 2:1-4<br />1 I will stand my watch And set myself on the rampart, And watch to see what He will say to me, And what I will answer when I am corrected. 2 Then the Lord answered me and said: "Write the vision And make it plain on tablets, That he may run who reads it. 3 For the vision is yet for an appointed time; But at the end it will speak, and it will not lie. Though it tarries, wait for it; Because it will surely come, It will not tarry. 4 "Behold the proud, His soul is not upright in him; But the just shall live by his faith.</blockquote>
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
1 Thessalonians 5:8 NKJV<br />But let us who are of the day be sober, putting on the breastplate of faith and love, and as a helmet the hope of salvation.</blockquote>
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
1 Thessalonians 1:3 NKJV<br />remembering without ceasing your work of faith, labor of love, and patience of hope in our Lord Jesus Christ in the sight of our God and Father,</blockquote>
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
1 Corinthians 13:13 NKJV<br />And now abide faith, hope, love, these three; but the greatest of these is love.</blockquote>
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
Ephesians 3:17 NKJV<br />that Christ may dwell in your hearts through faith; that you, being rooted and grounded in love,</blockquote>
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
Psalms 35:27 NKJV<br />Let them shout for joy and be glad, Who favor my righteous cause; And let them say continually, "Let the Lord be magnified, Who has pleasure in the prosperity of His servant."</blockquote>
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
1 Corinthians 13:7 GNT<br />Love never gives up; and its faith, hope, and patience never fail.</blockquote>
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
1 Corinthians 13:13 GNT<br />Meanwhile these three remain: faith, hope, and love; and the greatest of these is love.</blockquote>
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
Colossians 1:5 GNT<br />When the true message, the Good News, first came to you, you heard about the hope it offers. So your faith and love are based on what you hope for, which is kept safe for you in heaven.</blockquote>
<div>
<br /></div>
